extraction.one_line_summary: BUITRAGO Santiago attacked from breakaway on final climb Salita del Menador, dropped KÄMNA Lennard, won solo after earlier crash recovery
tactical_patterns: VAN DER POEL Mathieu attacked 65km out on Vetriolo climb, mimicking cyclocross aggression to split breakaway early.
BUITRAGO Santiago bridged after crash 80km out, then counter-attacked solo on final climb showing superior recovery.
LANDA Mikel attacked summit Monte Rovere but CARAPAZ Richard/HINDLEY Jai neutralized, revealing defensive parity between top two.
ALMEIDA João dropped on final climb by POELS Wout pacing, exposing fourth-place vulnerability under sustained tempo.

rider_signals.BUITRAGO Santiago: positive: recovered from crash at 80km to win, showing exceptional resilience under physical/mental pressure
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: nearly caught BUITRAGO on descent after being dropped summit, elite time-trial descending ability
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: neutral: attacked at 65km out but cracked on final climb, cyclocross aggression unsustainable in stage racing mountains
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: dropped by POELS tempo on final climb, losing time to podium trio and exposing weakness
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: attacked summit but gained only 7 seconds on CARAPAZ/HINDLEY, moved to podium with ALMEIDA fading
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: matched HINDLEY perfectly again, maintaining 3-second GC lead but unable to gain time
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: stayed with CARAPAZ on all attacks, confirming defensive strength but lack of attacking punch
rider_signals.POELS Wout: positive: paced final climb for BUITRAGO while dropping ALMEIDA, elite domestique work at altitude
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: neutral: front of chase group but unable to bridge to VAN DER POEL, consistent breakaway presence without finishing
rider_signals.BOUWMAN Koen: positive: extended KOM lead by 49 points total, tactical positioning in breakaway secures competition control
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: distanced on final climb, losing more time but retaining fifth overall through gaps behind
